'''Nim Abek''', whose real name was '''Nim'abek'shy-wedell''', was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Kajain'sa'Nikto/Legends|Kajain'sa'Nikto]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] who worked for the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] [[Sprax]].

==Biography==
Nim Abek began as a shipjacker in the [[Sisar Run/Legends|Sisar Run]] until he stole a ship from Sprax's personal fleet in a fast, professional, and flawless way. Sprax appreciated the non-destructive method of stealing [[Starship/Legends|starships]] and arranged for Nim Abek to be captured just so he could offer him a job.<ref name="SotSR" />

Nim Abek then went on to run [[Abek's Station]], a small [[Shadowport/Legends|shadowport]] just before the [[Ac'fren Spur]] of the Sisar Run where he commanded over 100 pirates.<ref name="SotSR" />
